CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2019 Continued To Oct-23-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint To Substitute Plaintiff Artem Koshkalda With E. Lynn Schoenmann In Her Capacity As Chapter 7 Trustee For The Bankruptcy Estate Of Artem Koshkalda
Off Calendar Aug-14-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jack Praetzellis, Esq. of Fox Rothschild, T:415.364.5540, for the moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Although the motion was unopposed, the Court posed some questions to counsel for the moving party. After the matter was discussed, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

REAL PARTY IN INTEREST E SCHOENMANN'S Motion To Amend Complaint To Substitute Plaintiff Artem Koshkalda With E. Lynn Schoenmann In Her Capacity As Chapter 7 Trustee For The Bankruptcy Estate Of Artem Koshkalda is GRANTED. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

Joinder To Real Party In Interest Plaintiff E Lynn Schoenmann Chapter 7 Trustee For The Bankruptcy Estate Of Artem Koshkaldas Motion To Amend Complaint To Substitute Plaintiff Artem Koshkalda With E Lynn Schoenmann In Her Capacity As Chapter 7 Trustee For The Bankruptcy Estate Of Artem Koshkalda
Off Calendar Aug-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE TOWNHOMES AT THE SHIPYARD OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S Joinder To Real Party In Interest Plaintiff E Lynn Schoenmann Chapter 7 Trustee For The Bankruptcy Estate Of Artem Koshkalda's Motion To Amend Complaint To Substitute Plaintiff Artem Koshkalda With E Lynn Schoenmann In Her Capacity As Chapter 7 Trustee For The Bankruptcy Estate Of Artem Koshkalda is GRANTED. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

Moving party to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
